priorityThreats.name: Chris Redfield
priorityThreats.summary: Highly trained combatant responsible for repeated interference in Umbrella operations. Exhibits extreme physical resilience.

priorityThreats.name: Jill Valentine
priorityThreats.summary: Elite operative with advanced infiltration and survival capabilities. Directly responsible for multiple operational failures.

priorityThreats.name: Leon S. Kennedy
priorityThreats.summary: Operative with repeated interference in Umbrella-related incidents. Displays high adaptability under extreme conditions.

priorityThreats.name: Ada Wong
priorityThreats.summary: Unpredictable infiltrator with advanced espionage capabilities. Motivations remain unclear.

priorityThreats.name: Claire Redfield
priorityThreats.summary: Civilian activist with persistent involvement in anti-Umbrella events.

priorityThreats.name: Barry Burton
priorityThreats.summary: Weapons specialist with strong ties to other high-value threats. Demonstrates high loyalty to S.T.A.R.S. personnel.

priorityThreats.name: Rebecca Chambers
priorityThreats.summary: Biochemist with firsthand knowledge of Umbrella assets. Survived multiple high-fatality incidents.

priorityThreats.name: Sherry Birkin
priorityThreats.summary: Subject exhibits unique regenerative properties. Considered a high-value biological anomaly.

priorityThreats.name: Carlos Oliveira
priorityThreats.summary: Former Umbrella mercenary who defected during Raccoon City incident.

priorityThreats.name: Brad Vickers
priorityThreats.summary: Pilot with limited combat capability. Terminated during Raccoon City incident.

priorityThreats.name: Joseph Frost
priorityThreats.summary: Alpha Team scout. Eliminated early during mansion incident.

priorityThreats.name: Richard Aiken
priorityThreats.summary: Communications specialist. Neutralized during initial outbreak.

priorityThreats.name: Enrico Marini
priorityThreats.summary: Bravo Team leader. Demonstrated high suspicion of Umbrella activities. Terminated.

priorityThreats.name: Forest Speyer
priorityThreats.summary: Sniper specialist. Deceased following B.O.W. encounter.

priorityThreats.name: Kenneth J. Sullivan
priorityThreats.summary: Recon specialist. First confirmed casualty of mansion incident.

priorityThreats.name: Edward Dewey
priorityThreats.summary: Bravo Team officer. Terminated during initial outbreak.

priorityThreats.name: Kevin Dooley
priorityThreats.summary: Bravo Team pilot. Deceased prior to major incidents.

priorityThreats.name: Steve Burnside
priorityThreats.summary: Deceased following T-Veronica exposure. Remains of interest for research replication.

priorityThreats.name: Mikhail Victor
priorityThreats.summary: U.B.C.S. platoon leader. Deceased following self-sacrifice during outbreak.
